text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Fuji, Brian. Can I ask you for a favor?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Sorry, but I unfortunately have plans.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's not it! C'mon, you seriously think that's all I
ever say?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Sorry, just teasing. So what is it?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
One of the students in the dorms is feeling
homesick. I was thinking of cooking up some local
delicacies for her.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You guys free for lunch tomorrow? I need some
taste-testers.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh? A prompt answer? From Brian?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Ama's cooking is just that good. Nothing tedious
about tasting her cooking.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I see. Well, I also enjoy Hishiama's cooking, so I'll
be there as well!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'm counting on you guys!
